event: Ball Scene — Set Design for Tchaikovsky's Queen of Spades
description: A wide, horizontal watercolor depicting an opulent 18th-century ballroom interior. The walls are pale blue-grey adorned with dark oval medallions. Curtains and drapery frame the right side. Small clusters of elegantly dressed figures are scattered throughout the room, some seated, some standing in conversation. Candlelight illuminates the scene from multiple points, creating a soft, warm glow in the otherwise cool-toned room. The style is loose and atmospheric, typical of theatrical set design.

_meta.title: The scene of the ball. Set Design for Tchaikovsky's opera "Queen of Spades"
